items.title: Israel Won't Have A Say In How The Iran War Ends Says Miller
items.summary: Aaron David Miller, a senior fellow at the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, joined Balance of Power to discuss the latest developments from the Iran War. He said he thinks Israel is not going to have much say in how the Iran war ends. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: US Strategic Petroleum Reserve Nears a 3-Year Low
items.summary: The US buffer for crude oil is shrinking fast as the Iran war drags on. The country’s emergency petroleum stockpile, known as the Strategic Petroleum Reserve, has shrunk to levels last seen in mid-2023, after the Biden administration decided to withdraw SPR crude barrels to mitigate the oil-price impact of the Russia-Ukraine war. items.title: Jobs Report Will Not Help Fed: Berro
items.summary:
Kelsey Berro, fixed income portfolio manager at JPMorgan Asset Management, joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." They discuss Friday's US jobs report and the path forward for new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: Marjane Satrapi, the Author of ‘Persepolis,’ Dies at 56
items.summary: Her popular graphic novel series, published in the early 2000s, followed an Iranian girl through the Islamic Revolution and the Iran-Iraq War.

items.title: On June 4, the world marks 37 years since the Chinese Communist Party ordered its troops to attack thousands of peaceful demonstrators in and around Tiananmen Square.  Those who sacrificed to uphold their unalienable rights of free expression and peaceful assembly will be vindicated someday.

items.title: No Sign of Progress in US-Iran Talks as Hezbollah Rejects Truce
items.summary: There was no sign of progress in ceasefire talks between the US and Iran after the worst burst of violence in weeks and as the Tehran-backed Hezbollah militia rejected on Thursday a US-brokered truce in Lebanon.

items.title: Treasuries Rise as Oil Signals Optimism on Iran Peace Accord
items.summary: Treasuries rose and the dollar slipped as investors drew optimism about the prospects of a US-Iran peace deal from a conditional ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon, despite ongoing clashes.

items.title:
RT by @UN: I condemn the recent killing of a Serbian @UNIFIL_ peacekeeper in Lebanon.

Seven peacekeepers serving with UNIFIL have now been killed & several more have been wounded since the escalation in hostilities since March this year.

These attacks must stop.
